summary: LocalReleaseService smoke now runs the target's declared executableName via cmd /c <cmd> (tool-path as CWD, resolving the .exe apphost OR the framework-dependent .cmd shim), with hx-only version/prereq/channel assertions gated to hx; CycleService.MarkReleaseTrainReleased short-circuits the bug-only (null-state) case BEFORE re-validation so a release's own just-tagged bug no longer self-excludes into an empty/invalid train (the fail-closed for a genuinely-empty release stays the pre-tag release-start check).
